properties.sql: SELECT COALESCE(es.id, bps.envelope_code || ':' || bps.source_contribution_code) AS id, bps.envelope_code, bps.source_contribution_code AS source_code, COALESCE(es.c_source_name, bps.source_contribution_code) AS source_name, COALESCE(es.c_donor_class, '—') AS donor_class, COALESCE(env.c_currency, 'LSL') AS currency, to_char(bps.allocated, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS allocated_disp, to_char(bps.available, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS available_disp, to_char(bps.reserved + bps.pre_committed + bps.committed, 'FM999,999,999.00') AS used_disp, ROUND(((bps.reserved + bps.pre_committed + bps.committed + bps.expensed) * 100.0) / NULLIF(bps.allocated, 0), 1) || '%' AS utilisation_pct, bps.last_event_at FROM budget_projection_by_source bps LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope_source es ON es.c_code = bps.source_contribution_code LEFT JOIN app_fd_budget_envelope env ON env.c_code = bps.envelope_code ORDER BY bps.envelope_code, bps.source_contribution_code
